# CWE-274 — Improper Handling of Insufficient Privileges (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-274-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

// Vulnerable: continues after EPERM as if the privileged action succeeded.
func RotateAuditLog(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	err := os.Rename("/var/log/audit/current", "/var/log/audit/prev")
	if err != nil {
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
		_, _ = w.Write([]byte(`{"rotated":true}`))
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
